title: Pattu Onnu  Lyrics Jilla Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Pattu onnu
Singers(s): Singer(s) S. P. Balasubramanyam,
Shankar Mahadevan
Lyrics:Yugabharathi
Movie: Jilla
Music : D Imman

Paatu onnu kattu kattu thodhaa
ne kaali kaiya thattu thattu jora.. (2)

veliyilla katha pola odu engum odu
thaara thappu thevayilla
podu aattam podu.

Sivanum sakthiyum serndha mass-u da
edhuthu ninnaa evanum dhoosuda.

Paatu onnu kattu kattu thodhaa
ne kaali kaiya thattu thattu jora..

Aalu ambu senai ellaam
thaevayillai neeyum ninna
edhayum velven inimel naanada.

Meesa vacha thaaya pola
pesukindara dheivam neeye
edhire nirkum imayam neeyada.

Ennai neeyum paarthukolla
kidaithaaye neeyum ingae
athanaale thaane unmel
thani paasam.

Unnakulle ennai neeyum
adai kaakkum anbai paarthu
varungaala natpum kooda
nammai pesum.

Sivanum sakthiyum serndha mass-u da
edhuthu ninnaa evanum dhoosuda.

Veera dheera soorarkellaam
verthu pogum unnai kandaal
unnai pol oruvan illai mannile

Naadu veedu kaadu ellaam
naan kadandhu ponaal kooda
thodarum undhan ninaivo nenjile

Uyir endru unnai naaney
oru naalum solla maaten
uyir endraal endri or naal
priivaaye ..

Orupodhum unnai vidamaaten thottrupoga
jayippomey naama indha puvimeley

Sivanum sakthiyum serndha mass-u da
edhuthu ninnaa evanum dhoosuda.

Paatu onnu kattu kattu thodhaa
ne kaali kaiya thattu thattu jora..

veliyilla katha pola odu engum odu
thaara thappu thevayilla
podu aattam podu.

Sivanum sakthiyum serndha mass-u da
edhuthu ninnaa evanum dhoosuda.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pattu Onnu?

The song Pattu Onnu celebrates joy and festivity, encouraging listeners to embrace life with energy and enthusiasm.

How does Pattu Onnu fit into the plot of Jilla?

In Jilla, Pattu Onnu serves as a lively backdrop to key celebratory moments, enhancing the film's vibrant atmosphere.

Who are the singers of Pattu Onnu?

The song features the incredible voices of Shankar Mahadevan and the legendary SPB.

Who composed the music for Pattu Onnu?

The music for Pattu Onnu was composed by D Imman, known for his catchy and energetic tunes.

When was Pattu Onnu released?

Pattu Onnu was released on December 17, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pattu Onnu, the exuberance of life is celebrated through lively beats and engaging lyrics. The song captures the essence of joy and festivity, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations and parties. With its infectious energy, it evokes feelings of happiness and togetherness, resonating with audiences. The collaboration of Shankar Mahadevan and SPB adds a unique charm, making this track a memorable highlight of the movie Jilla.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pattu Onnu from the movie Jilla is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring the powerful vocals of Shankar Mahadevan and the legendary SPB. This dynamic duet, composed by D Imman, perfectly captures the essence of festivity and joy. Get ready to groove to its infectious beats and uplifting lyrics that resonate with every celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Tie the song together, start with your hands clapping, clap along.. (2)
Like a story without an end, we run everywhere, there's no need for mistakes, just let the dance happen.
When Shiva and Shakti come together, no one can criticize you.
Tie the song together, start with your hands clapping, clap along..
There's no need for any army, I will fight for you from now on.
Like a mother with a mustache, God is standing in front of you, is that you?
You and I have a special bond, you are here, that's why I have a unique love for you.
The love that protects you and me will also speak with friendship.
When Shiva and Shakti come together, no one can criticize you.
Brave and strong, no one like you will be found on this earth.
Even if I cross the country, home, and forest, your thoughts will still remain in my heart.
I will never say you are my life, even if I say life is not just one day, my dear..
I will never let you go, we will win together, this flower will bloom.
When Shiva and Shakti come together, no one can criticize you.
Tie the song together, start with your hands clapping, clap along..
Like a story without an end, we run everywhere, there's no need for mistakes, just let the dance happen.
When Shiva and Shakti come together, no one can criticize you.
